name: ASP.NET Core API Development
tagline: Designing and building secure, scalable REST APIs with ASP.NET Core and C#.
description: End-to-end REST API development using ASP.NET Core and C#, including JWT-based authentication, role-based access control, and integration with SQL Server via Entity Framework Core. Built for performance, maintainability, and clean separation of concerns.

name: Clean Architecture & CQRS
tagline: Structuring applications with Clean Architecture, CQRS, and the Repository pattern for long-term maintainability.
description: Implementation of layered/Clean Architecture with CQRS and the Repository pattern, separating concerns across Domain, Application, Infrastructure, and API layers for testable, scalable codebases.

name: Angular Frontend Development
tagline: Responsive, component-based UIs built with Angular, HTML5, and CSS3.
description: Building responsive single-page applications with Angular, integrating with backend REST APIs, focused on clean component structure and usable interfaces.

name: SQL Server Database Design & Optimization
tagline: Schema design, indexing, and query tuning for SQL Server databases.
description: Database design including schema modeling, stored procedures, indexing strategies, and query optimization to improve performance at scale.

name: Redis Caching & Performance Optimization
tagline: Improving application response times with Redis caching and performance tuning.
description: Implementing caching strategies with Redis to reduce database load and improve response times, alongside general performance profiling and tuning.

name: Healthcare & HRMS Domain Solutions
tagline: Building domain-specific solutions for healthcare and HR/recruitment platforms.
description: Experience delivering modules across healthcare management (appointments, prescriptions, hospital admin) and HRMS (recruitment, onboarding workflows), with a strong understanding of domain-specific requirements.

name: AI-Assisted Development Workflows
tagline: Leveraging AI tools like GitHub Copilot and Claude to accelerate development without compromising quality.
description: Integrating AI-assisted development tools into daily workflows to improve productivity, code quality, and delivery speed — including code generation, review assistance, and documentation.

name: Production Support & Debugging
tagline: Root-cause analysis, debugging, and production support for live applications.
description: Hands-on production support including debugging, root cause analysis, and resolving live issues across deployed applications, with a focus on minimal downtime.
